summary.headline: Focus on multimodal reasoning and inference efficiency
summary.tldr: Today's research highlights advancements in multimodal reasoning with datasets like Open-MM-RL, while also addressing inference efficiency through techniques like KV-Fold for long-context processing. These developments are crucial for enhancing AI systems in safety-critical applications.
